span.p: Component View: Browser Memory Daemon - WSL Loopback HTTP Daemon

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Invokes explicit
request-independent use cases
through

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Executes health and audit
work through

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Reads and advances durable
blob lifecycle records in

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Reads pending deletion and
lifecycle health from

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Reports filesystem bytes,
reservations, and capacity
for

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Adapts BaseHTTPRequestHandler
requests through immutable
method/path descriptors with
static precedence; owns auth,
parsing, compatible
status/error responses,
request IDs, common security
headers, redaction-safe
telemetry, bounded response
streaming, disconnect
cleanup, CORS, and finite UI
assets.

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Provides request-independent
capture, lifecycle, read,
forget, policy, doctor, and
media use cases; owns
database-ready checks,
transaction/audit boundaries,
asynchronous media kickoff,
and upload/download resource
leases without importing HTTP
request or response types.

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Persists
committed/tombstoned/missing/deleted/blocked/failed
blob state; serializes
deletion processors; retries
tombstones; and dry-run
detects missing refs, in-root
orphans, and stale stages.

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Reports health, DB integrity,
FTS consistency, blob
lifecycle/pending deletion
state, runtime paths, storage
counts, media queue status,
and writes metadata-only
audit events to SQLite.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Durable complete
cleaned-text, relational, and
full-text authority for
migration ledger, sources,
documents, visits, capture
observations, URL claims,
visit events, snapshots,
chunks, chunks_fts, media
provenance/tasks, blob
lifecycle records, policy
rules, audit events, and
deletion receipts.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Reconstructible compatibility
evidence such as
pre-version-9 clean-text
sidecars; new captures create
no text sidecars.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Bounded disposable
image/video/audio bytes under
the configured media root;
explicit external roots
require mount and
identity-marker proof before
access.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Opt-in durable outage buffer
beneath the local WSL data
root; admission counts
committed files and distinct
in-flight SQLite
reservations, and drain
verifies bytes before tier
transition/source cleanup.
